title: Hedge-Bench: Benchmarking Agents on Hard, Realistic Tasks Pertaining to Financial Reasoning

source_archive.contents_summary: Complete manuscript source: 00README.json, paper.tex, seven section files, three table files, figures/assets, bibliography, class/style, and build files.

version_and_withdrawal_check: The immutable v1 arXiv API response contains exactly one normal entry and no withdrawal or retraction notice.
extraction_verification: The layout-preserving extraction is non-empty and UTF-8-readable, contains 12 form-feed page boundaries and no NUL characters, and was inspected at the title/abstract, task and environment description, rubric/aggregation methodology, results tables, limitations, references, and final page. These sections are legible. This acquisition record does not claim a deep review.

official_release.timing_boundary: The pinned repository commit predates immutable arXiv v1 publication on 2026-06-02 and is the repository's sole root commit at acquisition time.
official_release.commit_api_note: GitHub's commit response contains 300 file records and is therefore not used as the complete release manifest; the pinned codeload archive is the complete local snapshot.
official_release.license_status: No LICENSE/COPYING path appears in the pinned archive and GitHub reports no detected repository license. No reuse license is inferred.
official_release.acquisition_scope: The archive was integrity-tested and its top-level structure and 102 environment directories were counted. This acquisition record does not claim that task contents, graders, results, or paper/release conformance were deeply audited.
